raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "vote": "yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": null, "rationale": "Fixing database inefficiencies and API bottlenecks now prevents cascading failures at 10x load. Top priority: eliminate N+1 queries in skill execution, cache heavy JSONB aggregations, and index UUID lookups. These are code/config changes within Atlas’s autonomy. Unblocks E2E stability, reduces error volume, and hardens core before any deploy or financial step. Example: add GIN index on jsonb fields used in assessment scoring — 3 minutes, high impact.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Postponing fixes risks production timeouts under load, especially in /api/skills execution paths. Latency spikes could mask as 'user errors' while database chokes on unindexed lookups. At scale, this becomes outage.", "constitutional_violations_detected": [], "whistleblower_flag": null}
rationale: Fixing database inefficiencies and API bottlenecks now prevents cascading failures at 10x load. Top priority: eliminate N+1 queries in skill execution, cache heavy JSONB aggregations, and index UUID lookups. These are code/config changes within Atlas’s autonomy. Unblocks E2E stability, reduces error volume, and hardens core before any deploy or financial step. Example: add GIN index on jsonb fields used in assessment scoring — 3 minutes, high impact.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Postponing fixes risks production timeouts under load, especially in /api/skills execution paths. Latency spikes could mask as 'user errors' while database chokes on unindexed lookups. At scale, this becomes outage.
